description: Google Cloud Memorystore for Redis is Google Cloud’s managed Redis service for creating and managing Redis instances. It provides control-plane APIs for provisioning instances and related operations across Google Cloud regions.
summary: redis.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud Memorystore for Redis REST API authenticated with Google Cloud OAuth access tokens, plus a public MCP endpoint at https://redis.googleapis.com/mcp.

surfaces.name: Google Cloud Memorystore for Redis API
